name: Cannoli Cake 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine cake mix, oil, eggs, and milk in a bowl and stir until well mixed. Pour the batter into two 9-inch round layer pans or one 11x14-inch pan.
3. Bake layers for 25-30 minutes or the rectangle pan for 30-35 minutes, until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Let the cake cool completely.
5. In a separate bowl, blend ricotta cheese, sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla until well combined. Spread the mixture over the cooled cake layers.
6. Dot with maraschino cherries for color, if desired.
7. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
